expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 是总尺寸，[板厚] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] เป็นความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] เป็นความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu tấm Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu tấm Lưng. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukwenta ang mga sukat ng kahoy para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal na ng Pang-itaas, Pang-ilalim at Gilid na Kahoy, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal na kahoy sa likod. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အားကောင်းပေးသည့်သည့် ပစ္စည်း [[]] ...  {[ ...]} ။([Width fromuarythickness ہے۔. Ai translated), [Bring AI translated], t တွေ့ဆင်နေသည်။. CHECK)
remarks.km:
គណនាតំបន់ឈើសម្រាប់ទូ។  [Width],[Height],[Depth]គឺជា វិធានសរុបកម្រាស់បបោក[BoardThick]គឺ ពិដ្ឋានជាតិសំលេងនិងវឌ្ឍភាពសំរា חוק ​​​​.  Samədəni(builder B]
